band: [1e6, 1e7), all rungs bin-matched on log10 to Uniform(6,7) over 50 bins (identical magnitude, moments, digit distribution)
rungs: single, sum2, sum3, count(Poisson tally), prod2..6
keff: per-record keff_rec = E[H2|d=7]/H2(rec); rung keff = E[H2|d=7]/mean H2; keff-only classifier = keff_rec
notes: anchors (RSA/smooth/primorial/factorial) regenerated synthetically as the same constructions
